goal: 提升 Catty dogfood health 的 live DB 忙锁韧性

summary.title: 提升 Catty dogfood health 的 live DB 忙锁韧性
summary.what: 新增 Catty SQLite live DB helper：openCattySqliteDatabase 统一给读写连接设置 5s busy_timeout，sqliteTableExists 统一处理只读表存在性检查；dogfood-health 相关的 report、memory candidates、canary queue/eval、accepted-memory tail、judge-record、trail 和 SqliteCattyStore 都改走该 helper，并新增 sqlite-db.test.ts 覆盖 busy_timeout 与 tableExists 行为。
summary.why: 本轮 live smoke 中 dogfood-health 在读取真实 events.sqlite 时遇到 SQLITE_BUSY_RECOVERY，说明 v0 dogfood 总览会被 heartbeat/SQLite 恢复锁打断。dogfood-health 是推进真实 dogfood 的只读诊断入口，应该在 live DB 短暂忙锁时 bounded wait，而不是直接崩溃或把状态误报为空。
summary.user_goal: 提升 Catty dogfood health 的 live DB 忙锁韧性

decisions.chose: 新增共享 sqlite-db helper，并迁移 dogfood-health 会经过的生产读库入口。
decisions.rationale: 忙锁是 live DB 访问边界问题，不是某个 stage 的业务问题；集中处理能避免各模块用不同方式吞错或漏设 timeout。
rejected: 只在 dogfood-health 顶层 catch SQLITE_BUSY

decisions.chose: 使用 SQLite 原生 PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000。
decisions.rationale: 这给 heartbeat 写入/恢复一个有界等待窗口，同时不引入异步轮询、后台重试或额外状态写入。
rejected: 把 busy 当成空表/空队列

decisions.chose: 只改只读/持久层连接 helper，不接 heartbeat、不调模型、不写 user memory。
decisions.rationale: 本轮目标是让 dogfood 可观测入口更可靠，不能把状态迁移、provider/envchain 或 memory admission 混进同一个切片。

rejected.alternative: 遇到 SQLITE_BUSY 时返回空 dogfood health
rejected.reason: 这会把数据库暂时忙锁伪装成没有 canary 或没有 prediction，污染 v0 readiness 判断。

rejected.alternative: 顺手修 provider/envchain 真实模型注入
rejected.reason: 那是下一条 dogfood 阻塞线；本轮只处理 live DB 可观测性，不读取或回显 secrets。

acknowledged_constraints.note: 没有接入 heartbeat 模型调用、没有写 user memory、没有扩大 src/main.ts。
CLAUDE.md 保持无关 unstaged dirty，提交只包含本轮 src/catty 文件。

review_notes: 验证通过：bun test src/catty/sqlite-db.test.ts src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts src/catty/memory-canary.test.ts src/catty/memory-canary-eval.test.ts，13 pass。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/*.test.ts，65 pass。
live smoke：bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts --date 2026-05-26 --max 5 返回既有 no_user_prior_candidates / no_canary_plans / no_canary_queue blockers，没有再出现 SQLITE_BUSY_RECOVERY。
runtime truth：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 显示 heartbeat observe OK，full pipeline 因 30m 窗口正常 throttled。

subsystems: Catty canary / accepted-memory read-only status chain
architectural_claims: Catty live SQLite access now has a shared helper that applies a bounded busy_timeout to both read-only and write connections.
Dogfood health remains a read-only composition layer; SQLite busy handling does not create tables, write user memory, mutate canary state, or call a model provider.
Table existence checks are centralized so missing Catty tables and temporarily busy live DB reads are no longer handled with duplicated ad hoc Database openings.
behavioral_changes: Read-only Catty dogfood commands wait up to 5s for transient SQLite busy/recovery locks instead of immediately failing on live DB access.
sqliteTableExists returns false for missing DB files while using the same live-read connection helper for existing DBs.
SqliteCattyStore string-path connections now receive the same busy_timeout used by CLI/read helpers.
security_implications: No secrets, config files, API keys, cookies, or ~/.agents/memory/config.json content were read or logged.
No user-prior memory, memory audit, canary status, promotion receipt, or heartbeat wiring was written by this change.
migration_notes: No schema migration required; this only changes how SQLite connections are opened.
Existing tests and CLI callers keep their current arguments and output contracts.
